payload.title: Okta SSO redirect loop
payload.description: When I log into Okta and click on the Workday tile, the page redirects me back to Okta in a loop. I cleared cookies and tried Chrome and Edge — same behaviour. Affects all my SaaS apps that use Workday-SSO. Started ~30 min ago.

payload.Title: Floor 4 colour printer offline
payload.Description: The HP colour printer 4F-CP01 shows 'offline' for everyone on the floor. We need it for client packets today.
